welcome.title: Welcome to LeadAwaker!
welcome.subtitle: Let's get you set up in a few minutes
welcome.skipConfirmBody: You can restart it anytime from Settings.

3.label: Your Leads
3.desc: View and import your lead contacts

steps.profileSetupDesc: Let's start by setting up your profile — your name, timezone, and notification preferences.
steps.profileNameDesc: Enter your full name. This is how you'll appear across the platform.
steps.profileTimezoneDesc: Select your timezone so notifications and scheduled messages align with your business hours.
steps.saveProfileDesc: Click Save to apply your changes. You can update these anytime.
steps.yourCampaignsDesc: Campaigns are outreach sequences that engage your leads. Let's take a look at what's been set up for you.
steps.campaignOverviewDesc: Here are your campaigns. Each one has a status, channel (SMS/WhatsApp), and message templates. Click on any campaign to see its details.
steps.campaignDetailsDesc: This panel shows the campaign's configuration — message templates, bump schedule, AI settings, and performance metrics.
steps.yourLeadsDesc: Leads are the contacts your campaigns reach out to. Let's see how to add them.
steps.leadsTableDesc: This table shows all your leads with their status, campaign assignment, and engagement data. You can search, filter, and sort.
steps.importCsvDesc: Click the CSV button to import leads from a spreadsheet. You'll map columns to fields and preview before importing.
steps.conversationsDesc: This is where you'll monitor all lead interactions — incoming replies, AI responses, and manual takeovers.
steps.inboxDesc: The inbox shows all active conversations sorted by recency. Unread messages appear at the top.
steps.chatViewDesc: Click a conversation to see the full message thread. You can reply manually or let the AI handle it.
steps.calendarDesc: When leads book calls, they show up here. That's the end of the tour — you're all set!

completion.title: You're all set!
completion.body: Your account is configured and your campaign is ready to go. Leads will start receiving messages during your business hours.
